text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bring Nishino Flower to a lush, green park as a
way to thank her for always helping me recharge
when I'm feeling weary.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow! The scent of the trees and flowers is
wonderful... Hehe, this place is so refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for bringing me, Trainer! I
love it here, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
These are all things only I like... Aren't you
bored?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every single one of the relaxation techniques
she's shown me so far has worked wonders.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So anything that provides her comfort will surely
make me feel the same way too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her to take it easy and relax to her heart's
content.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll do just that and have a nice, easygoing
day!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look at all the pretty fish over there!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hearing the murmur of a stream while surrounded
by all this verdant flora is simply wonderful! Wow,
the river from before looks so tiny—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-whoa! I had no idea this suspension bridge
was so high up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Trainer? Can you... hold my hand? Just
until we get to the other side...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Phweee!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! A leaf whistle. It's been forever since I
made one, so I'm a little out of practice.
choice_data_list: Can you teach me how to make one too?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of course! First, you have to find a long, narrow
leaf. Then, put the end to your lips like this and...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the plum kelp tea. It really hits the
spot when you're tired, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It sure is! And spending time like this is so...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, nothing. It's almost time to leave, isn't it?
Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for today. I had a great time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy... and I feel so blessed.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, do you remember how I said I like taking it
easy?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I love being completely at peace and not having
a care in the world.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It makes me feel so warm and fuzzy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined that I'd get to experience that
lovely feeling again with someone, since I can't
meet up with my older neighbors so easily
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Every second we spent today was amazing. I can't
put words to how happy I was.
choice_data_list: We should go out again sometime!
Don't sweat it. I'll join you anytime.

How about we just laze about and relax next
time?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yay, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But after spending so much time relaxing, I'll have
to really put in work for my next race!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've got it. If I perform well in my race, why
don't we come back here to celebrate?
choice_data_list: I think that's a great idea.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Then I'll need to give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to achieve victory and then relax with you
again!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow... What a line. You sure are mature, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Definitely! You always seem so in control, and I
feel like I can always rely on you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I need to become a grown-up Umamusume who's
worthy of standing by your side...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'll strive to follow your example, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I resolve to always conduct myself as an
upstanding adult should, for her sake as much as
my own.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That sounds great! We'll need some desserts to
go along with our tea, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've got some red bean jelly that would be just
perfect. Leave everything to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days later, I share a relaxing teatime with
an enthusiastic Nishino Flower. I could definitely
get used to afternoons like this.
